prompt: Perform simplified year-end closing for 2025: 1) Calculate and post annual depreciation for three assets: Kjøretøy (458850 NOK, 10 years straight-line, account 1230), Inventar (428350 NOK, 8 years, account 1240), IT-utstyr (489350 NOK, 8 years, account 1210). Use account 6010 for depreciation expense and 1209 for accumulated depreciation. 2) Reverse prepaid expenses (total 68800 NOK on account 1700). 3) Calculate and post tax provision (22% of taxable profit) on account 8700/2920. Post each depreciation as a separate voucher.

postings.description: Tax provision (to be calculated based on taxable profit)

parsed_task.raw_prompt: Perform simplified year-end closing for 2025: 1) Calculate and post annual depreciation for three assets: Kjøretøy (458850 NOK, 10 years straight-line, account 1230), Inventar (428350 NOK, 8 years, account 1240), IT-utstyr (489350 NOK, 8 years, account 1210). Use account 6010 for depreciation expense and 1209 for accumulated depreciation. 2) Reverse prepaid expenses (total 68800 NOK on account 1700). 3) Calculate and post tax provision (22% of taxable profit) on account 8700/2920. Post each depreciation as a separate voucher.
